name: kcode
description: Kcode - AI Agent Powered Development Environment (VS Code Extension)

kcode.agentName.description: Agent name or executable path. Leave empty if no agent is configured.

kcode.agentArgs.description: Additional arguments passed to the agent

kcode.openaiApiKey.description: OpenAI API key for the built-in OpenAI agent. Falls back to OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.

kcode.openaiModel.description: OpenAI model name for the built-in OpenAI agent. Falls back to OPENAI_MODEL environment variable.

kcode.agentPath.description: Path to the agent executable. Used when kcode.agentName is "opencode" or "kilo". Falls back to built-in defaults.

kcode.openaiBaseUrl.description: OpenAI API base URL for the built-in OpenAI agent. Falls back to OPENAI_BASE_URL environment variable.

kcode.acpLogEnabled.description: Enable ACP protocol log collection (default: off). Toggle via the ACP Log button in the chat toolbar.

kcode.acpLogMaxGlobal.description: Maximum ACP log entries to keep across all tasks.

kcode.acpLogMaxTask.description: Maximum ACP log entries per single task.

kcode.githubToken.description: GitHub Personal Access Token, used to increase API rate limit when importing issues.
